title: AGI is FAKE: The Biggest AI Lie Exposed
summary: A video argues that current AI models face fundamental mathematical limits that cannot be overcome by scaling alone, referencing the Time Hierarchy Theorem and transformer architecture constraints. It critiques AGI hype while examining why autonomous agents accumulate errors and model accuracy cannot reach 100 percent.
